vocab.example: 我们全家去年去森林露营。
妈妈为我们准备了一顿饭。
他不习惯单独一个人呆在家里。
他用绳子把木头绑在一起。
老师叫大家在操场集合。
他太饿了，一下子就狼吞虎咽地吃完了。
这些是贵重物品，要小心保管。
你应该每天换干净的袜子。
今天帮邻居做家务，我感到很充实。
他在长跑比赛中得了冠军。
现在轮到你上场表演了。
孩子们喜欢在后山探险。
大家齐心协力，终于完成了任务。
这次活动需要大家的紧密配合。
他用毛巾擦了擦脸上的汗。
洗手可以防止病菌传播。

sentences.text: 听到喊声，他不管三七二十一，跳下水救人。
sentences.description: Regardless of consequences, jumping in to save someone.

sentences.text: 回到家里，我虽然很累，但是却感到很充实。
sentences.description: Tired but feeling fulfilled after a long day.

sentences.text: 我心跳开始加快，手心开始冒汗，心像在打鼓一样。
sentences.description: Heart racing and palms sweating like a drum.

sentences.text: 碧蓝的天空万里无云，今天又是风和日丽的好天气。
sentences.description: Clear blue sky and beautiful sunny weather.

sentences.text: 天空本来是晴朗的，但过了不久却乌云密布，雷声隆隆。

露营.zh: 我们打算周末去山里露营。
露营.en: We plan to go camping in the mountains this weekend.

露营.zh: 露营需要准备帐篷和睡袋。
露营.en: Camping requires preparing a tent and a sleeping bag.

露营.zh: 孩子们在露营活动中学会了照顾自己。
露营.en: The children learned to take care of themselves during the camping activity.

露营.zh: 昨晚露营时，我们在屋外看了星星。
露营.en: Last night while camping, we watched the stars outside.

露营.zh: 他第一次参加露营，感到非常兴奋。
露营.en: He was very excited as it was his first time participating in camping.

一顿饭.zh: 妈妈做了一顿饭给我们吃。
一顿饭.en: Mom made a meal for us to eat.

一顿饭.zh: 吃完这一顿饭后，我们就要出发了。
一顿饭.en: After finishing this meal, we will depart.

一顿饭.zh: 这一顿饭虽然简单，但大家吃得很开心。
一顿饭.en: Although this meal was simple, everyone enjoyed it very much.

一顿饭.zh: 请朋友吃一顿饭表示感谢。
一顿饭.en: Treat a friend to a meal to express gratitude.

一顿饭.zh: 他匆忙吃了一顿饭就去上学了。
一顿饭.en: He hurriedly ate a meal and left for school.

单独.en: The teacher wants to speak with you individually.

单独.zh: 小明敢一个人单独留在家里。
单独.en: Xiao Ming dares to stay at home all alone.

单独.zh: 晚上不要单独在黑夜里走。
单独.en: Do not walk alone at night in the dark.

单独.zh: 这个任务需要你单独去完成。
单独.en: This task requires you to complete it individually.

单独.zh: 他喜欢单独一个人安静地看书。
单独.en: He likes reading quietly by himself.

绑.zh: 请把这两个鞋带绑在一起。
绑.en: Please tie these two shoelaces together.

绑.zh: 他的双手被绳子绑住了。
绑.en: His hands were tied by the rope.

绑.zh: 妈妈给妹妹绑了一个漂亮的发型。
绑.en: Mom tied a nice hairstyle for my younger sister.

绑.zh: 我们要把垃圾袋绑紧再扔掉。
绑.en: We need to tie the garbage bag tightly before throwing it away.

绑.zh: 医生用纱布把他的伤口绑好。
绑.en: The doctor wrapped and bound his wound with gauze.

集合.zh: 同学们早上八点在操场集合。
集合.en: Students gather on the sports field at eight in the morning.

集合.zh: 听到响声后，大家快速集合。
集合.en: Upon hearing the sound, everyone gathered quickly.

集合.zh: 老师正在点名，请集合好队伍。
集合.en: The teacher is taking attendance, please line up and gather nicely.

集合.zh: 我们在校门口集合，准备一起出发。
集合.en: We gathered at the school gate, getting ready to depart together.

集合.zh: 队长发出了集合的指令。
集合.en: The captain issued the directive to gather.

狼吞虎咽.zh: 他饿坏了，吃起东西来狼吞虎咽。
狼吞虎咽.en: He was starving, devouring his food wolfishly.

狼吞虎咽.zh: 看到桌上的美食，大家开始狼吞虎咽。
狼吞虎咽.en: Seeing the delicious food on the table, everyone began wolfing it down.

狼吞虎咽.zh: 吃饭时狼吞虎咽对胃不好。
狼吞虎咽.en: Gobbling up food during meals is bad for the stomach.

狼吞虎咽.zh: 弟弟狼吞虎咽地把面包吃光了。
狼吞虎咽.en: Little brother wolfed down the bread completely.

狼吞虎咽.zh: 运动完后，他狼吞虎咽地喝干了一大碗汤。
狼吞虎咽.en: After exercising, he wolfed down and finished a large bowl of soup.

贵重.zh: 离开房间时请带好贵重物品。
贵重.en: Please take your valuable belongings with you when leaving the room.

贵重.zh: 这件礼物非常贵重，我要好好保存。
贵重.en: This gift is very precious, so I must keep it safe.

贵重.zh: 不要把贵重的东西放在显眼的地方。
贵重.en: Do not put valuable things in noticeable places.

贵重.zh: 这块手表是他收到的最贵重的生日礼物。
贵重.en: This watch is the most valuable birthday present he received.

贵重.zh: 钱包里有贵重的证书和现金。
贵重.en: There are valuable certificates and cash inside the wallet.

摔倒.zh: 地太滑了，我不小心摔倒了。
摔倒.en: The ground was too slippery and I accidentally fell over.

摔倒.zh: 小朋友摔倒后坚强地站了起来。
摔倒.en: After falling over, the child stood up bravely.

摔倒.zh: 跑步时要小心，防止摔倒。
摔倒.en: Be careful when running to prevent falling over.

摔倒.zh: 爷爷在楼梯口不小心摔倒了。
摔倒.en: Grandpa accidentally fell down at the entrance of the stairs.

摔倒.zh: 摔倒了不要紧，擦干眼泪继续往前走。
摔倒.en: It's okay to fall down; dry your tears and keep going forward.

袜子.zh: 天冷了，记得穿上厚袜子。
袜子.en: The weather is getting cold, remember to put on thick socks.

袜子.zh: 弟弟的袜子开了一个小洞。
袜子.en: Little brother's socks have a small hole in them.

袜子.zh: 洗完袜子后要把它们晾干。
袜子.en: After washing the socks, they should be hung out to dry.

袜子.zh: 我今天穿了一双红色的袜子。
袜子.en: I am wearing a pair of red socks today.

袜子.zh: 抽屉里收拾得整整齐齐，全是袜子。
袜子.en: The drawer is neatly organized, full of socks.

感到充实.zh: 充实地过好每一天让我感到很高兴。
感到充实.en: Living every day fruitfully makes me feel very happy.

感到充实.zh: 参加完志愿服务后，我感到充实。
感到充实.en: After participating in volunteer service, I felt fulfilled.

感到充实.zh: 读了一下午的书，他心里感到充实。
感到充实.en: Having read books for an entire afternoon, he felt enriched in his heart.

感到充实.zh: 丰富的假期生活让我们感到充实。
感到充实.en: A rich vacation life makes us feel fulfilled.

感到充实.zh: 学到了新知识后，我觉得生活感到充实。
感到充实.en: Having learned new knowledge, I feel that life is fulfilling.

冠军.zh: 他在游泳比赛中夺得了冠军。
冠军.en: He won the championship in the swimming competition.

冠军.zh: 我们的团队拿下了今年的冠军。
冠军.en: Our team secured this year's championship.

冠军.zh: 经过刻苦训练，她终于成为了冠军。
冠军.en: After hard training, she finally became a champion.

冠军.zh: 大家都在为获得冠军的队伍欢呼。
冠军.en: Everyone was cheering for the winning champion team.

冠军.zh: 冠军站在领奖台上，流下了激动的眼泪。
冠军.en: The champion stood on the podium and shed tears of excitement.

轮.zh: 这一轮比赛马上就要开始了。
轮.en: This round of the game is about to start.

轮.zh: 下一个轮到谁上场表演了？
轮.en: Whose turn is it next to perform on stage?

轮.zh: 我们轮流照顾病床上的同学。
轮.en: We take turns taking care of the student in the sickbed.

轮.zh: 新一轮的测试将于下周举行。
轮.en: A new round of testing will be held next week.

轮.zh: 月亮像一轮明镜高挂在空中。
轮.en: The moon hangs high in the sky like a bright round mirror.

探险.zh: 他们打算去神秘的森林里探险。
探险.en: They intend to go on an adventure in the mysterious forest.

探险.zh: 探险队员们克服了重重困难。
探险.en: The team of adventurers overcame numerous difficulties.

探险.zh: 这本童话书讲的是一个去海底探险的故事。
探险.en: This fairy tale book is about an underwater adventure story.

探险.zh: 户外探险需要带足安全装备。
探险.en: Outdoor adventure requires bringing sufficient safety gear.

探险.zh: 哥哥从小就梦想着去沙漠探险。
探险.en: My elder brother has dreamed of going on a desert adventure since he was young.

齐心协力.zh: 只要大家齐心协力，就能战胜困难。
齐心协力.en: As long as everyone works together as one, we can overcome difficulties.

齐心协力.zh: 同学们齐心协力完成了大扫除。
齐心协力.en: The students joined forces and completed the general cleanup.

齐心协力.zh: 队员们齐心协力，最终赢得了比赛。
齐心协力.en: The team members cooperated with united effort and ultimately won the match.

齐心协力.zh: 在灾难面前，全国人民齐心协力度过难关。
齐心协力.en: In the face of disaster, the whole nation works together to tide over the crisis.

齐心协力.zh: 齐心协力的团队往往能创造奇迹。
齐心协力.en: A team working with united hearts and efforts can often create miracles.

禁止.zh: 这里是公共场所，禁止吸烟。
禁止.en: This is a public area where smoking is prohibited.

禁止.zh: 图书馆里禁止大声喧哗。
禁止.en: Making loud noises is strictly forbidden in the library.

禁止.zh: 游泳池附近禁止追逐打闹。
禁止.en: Chasing and playing around near the swimming pool is prohibited.

禁止.zh: 危险区域，禁止他人进入。
禁止.en: Dangerous area; entry by others is forbidden.

配合.zh: 队员之间的默契配合是获胜的关键。
配合.en: Tacit cooperation among team members is the key to victory.

配合.zh: 请大家积极配合医生的检查。
配合.en: Please actively cooperate with the doctor's checkup.

配合.zh: 这个节目需要两个人互相配合才能完成。
配合.en: This performance requires two people to coordinate with each other to complete.

配合.zh: 只要我们好好配合，很快就能做好。
配合.en: As long as we cooperate well, we can get it done quickly.

配合.zh: 老师赞扬了大家在活动中的良好配合。
配合.en: The teacher praised everyone's good coordination during the activity.

擦.zh: 请用湿抹布把桌子擦干净。
擦.en: Please wipe the table clean with a wet rag.

擦.zh: 他用手擦掉了脸上的汗水。
擦.en: He wiped away the sweat on his face with his hand.

擦.zh: 妹妹不小心擦伤了膝盖。
擦.en: Younger sister accidentally scraped her knee.

擦.zh: 老师在黑板上擦掉了写错的字。
擦.en: The teacher erased the misspelled words on the blackboard.

擦.zh: 鞋子上落了灰尘，需要擦一擦。
擦.en: Dust has settled on the shoes, so they need to be wiped.

防止.zh: 关好门窗可以防止小偷进入。
防止.en: Locking doors and windows can prevent thieves from breaking in.

防止.zh: 出门戴口罩可以防止感冒传染。
防止.en: Wearing a mask when going out can prevent the spread of colds.

防止.zh: 走路看路可以防止摔倒。
防止.en: Looking where you walk can prevent you from falling.

防止.zh: 我们要采取措施防止水土流失。
防止.en: We need to take measures to prevent soil erosion.

防止.zh: 食物放在冰箱里可以防止变质。
防止.en: Storing food in the refrigerator can prevent it from spoiling.
